subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down from the Wronged One in truth, that it may draw mankind nigh unto God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. O people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المظلوم نزل بالحق لیقرب الناس الی الله المهیمن القیوم یا ملا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @thankfulness; gratitude, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God
